name: French Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pie shell (If frozen, bake at 400°F for 7-9 minutes). Set aside to cool.
2. Blend the cream cheese and heavy cream until soft.
3. Spread over cooled pie shell.
4. Wash and hull the berries. Select half of the best ones; slice in half; set aside.
5. Mix the remaining sugar with the rest of the berries, cornstarch, and a few drops of lemon juice. Cook until thick, stirring constantly.
6. Cool the berry mixture.
7. Put half of the berry sauce over the cream cheese layer in the pie pan.
8. Arrange strawberries on top of the sauce.
9. Pour the remaining puree over the berries.
10. Chill before serving.
11. Top with sweetened whipped cream.
